description: Create a comprehensive GitHub Actions workflow named CI that triggers on push to main, pull requests, and tag creation. The workflow consists of multiple jobs: lint, build, emscripten, wasi, sanitize, build-wasm2c-memchecked, build-min-cmake, and build-rlbox, each running on ubuntu-latest or a matrix of operating systems. These jobs set up Python, check out the repository, install tools, and perform various build, test, and validation tasks.
